sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2655" key="ai(rhsitei/xhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱρησιτείχης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ους</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n2655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taker of cities</tr_>, name of play by Diphilus.</sense> </entryFree>
